title: rubus granulatus var. krasanii
intro: Rubus granulatus var. krasanii, also known as the Korean thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus granulatus var. krasanii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant may be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
